info.name: Merchant API
info.description:
Soeat Merchant V0 API (`/api/v0/merchant`) — food ordering & restaurant management platform.

**Getting started:** import this collection alongside the companion environment, select the environment, then run **Authentication > Login** first — it captures `access_token`, `merchant_id`, and `restaurant_id` automatically.

**Envelope:** all responses follow `{success, message?, data}` on success or `{success:false, message, error_code, errors?}` on error. Enum fields are objects `{value, label, color}`.

**Feature gates:** endpoints under Delivery, Customers, Galleries, Cancellation Requests, Staff, POS, Discounts, Coupons, and Tables are behind `app_mode` feature flags and may return `403 FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE` if that feature is disabled for the merchant/app mode.

**Pagination envelope:** every paginated list endpoint returns a flat `{success, data: [...], meta: {...}}` shape — `meta` is always a sibling of `data`, never nested inside it. Orders and Notifications additionally include a `links` object that other endpoints do not.

**Known API inconsistencies (intentionally preserved, not normalized):** (1) pagination filters use Spatie `filter[x]=`/`sort=` on most endpoints but flat `search`/`status` params on Guests/Reviews/Cancellation Requests; (2) several "list" endpoints (Guests, POS, Beneficiaries, Areas.Tables) return plain unpaginated arrays with no `meta` at all.

This collection intentionally does not include separate "Restaurant"/"Settings"/"Utilities" folders from a generic template — those concerns are covered by the **Profile** folder in this API; there is no distinct utilities endpoint group.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: JWT authentication for merchant staff (`api-merchant` guard). Run **Login** first — it captures `access_token`, `merchant_id`, and `restaurant_id` into the environment automatically.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Authenticate a merchant staff user (owner/manager/cashier/chef/waiter) and obtain a JWT access token.

**Auth required:** No (throttled via `auth-login` rate limiter).

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/login`

**Body:** `email` (required, valid email), `password` (required, string).

**Success response (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "access_token": "eyJ...",
    "token_type": "bearer",
    "expires_in": 3600,
    "user": { "id": "uuid", "name": "Owner Name", "email": "owner@soeat.id", "role": "owner", "role_label": "Owner" },
    "merchants": [ { "id": "uuid", "name": "Merchant Name", "slug": "merchant-slug" } ]
  }
}
```

**Error response (401):**
```json
{ "success": false, "message": "Invalid credentials", "error_code": "INVALID_CREDENTIALS" }
```

**Purpose:** Refresh the JWT before/after it expires. This endpoint reads the *current* access token from the `Authorization` header (via `JWTAuth::parseToken()->refresh()`) rather than a separate `refresh_token` field — unlike typical OAuth refresh flows.

**Auth required:** No collection-level auth, but the current `{{access_token}}` must be sent explicitly as a Bearer header (throttled via `auth-refresh`).

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/refresh`

**Body:** none.

**Success response (200):** same `AuthTokenData` shape as Login.

**Error response (401):** invalid/expired token.

**Purpose:** Fetch the currently authenticated merchant staff user.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/me`

**Success response (200):**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "id": "uuid", "name": "...", "email": "...", "role": "owner", "role_label": "Owner" } }
```

**Error response (401):** unauthenticated.

**Purpose:** Update the authenticated user's own profile (currently just `name`).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `PUT /api/v0/merchant/me`

**Body:** `name` (sometimes, string, max:255).

**Success response (200):** updated user object.

**Error response (422):** validation error.

**Purpose:** Invalidate the current JWT.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/logout`

**Success response (200):** `{ "success": true, "message": "Logged out successfully" }` (`data` omitted).

**Error response (401):** unauthenticated.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Cross-merchant notification inbox for the authenticated user. Note the top-level `meta`/`links` envelope on the list endpoint, unlike most other list endpoints.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List notifications for the authenticated user across all their merchants.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/notifications`

**Query params:** `per_page` (default 10, max 50), `page`.

**Note:** `meta` is top-level (sibling of `data`), same as every other paginated list endpoint in this API. This endpoint additionally includes a `links` object (like Orders) that other endpoints do not.

**Success response (200):**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": [ { "id": "uuid", "title": "...", "read_at": null } ], "meta": { "current_page": 1 }, "links": { "next": null } }
```

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {
pm.test("Response includes top-level links object", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single notification.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/notifications/{{notification_id}}`

**Error response (404):** not found.

**Purpose:** Delete a notification.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `DELETE /api/v0/merchant/notifications/{{notification_id}}`

**Success response (200):** `{ "success": true, "message": "Notification deleted" }`.

**Purpose:** Get the count of unread notifications for badge display.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Success response (200):**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "count": 3 } }
```

**Purpose:** Mark a single notification as read.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/notifications/{{notification_id}}/read`

**Purpose:** Mark all notifications as read for the authenticated user.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/notifications/read-all`

item.name: Orders
item.description: Cross-merchant order management. List and payment-status endpoints use a top-level `meta`/`links` envelope, unlike most other resources in this collection.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List orders across all merchants the authenticated user belongs to.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/orders`

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[order_status]` (exact), `filter[payment_status]` (exact), `filter[merchant_id]` (exact), `filter[search]` (matches order code / customer name), `filter[date_from]`, `filter[date_to]`; `sort` (allowed: `created_at`, `total_price`, `code`, default `-created_at`); `per_page` (default 10, max 50).

**Note:** `meta` is top-level (sibling of `data`), same as every other paginated list endpoint in this API. Orders/Notifications additionally include a `links` object that other endpoints do not.

**Success response (200):** `{ "success": true, "data": [ {"id": "uuid", "code": "ORD-001", "order_status": {"value":"new","label":"New","color":"gray","is_final":false}, "total_price": 50000 } ], "meta": {...}, "links": {...} }`

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {
pm.test("Response includes top-level links object", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get full order details.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/orders/{{order_id}}`

**Error response (404):** not found / not owned by user's merchants.

**Purpose:** Poll the current payment status of an order (e.g. while waiting for QRIS/bank transfer settlement).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Success response (200):**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "payment_status": {"value":"settlement","label":"Settlement","color":"success"} } }
```

**Purpose:** Transition an order through its lifecycle (accept/process/complete/reject).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Method / URL:** `PATCH /api/v0/merchant/orders/{{order_id}}/status`

**Body:** `status` (required, one of `new,process,completed,rejected`); `reason` (required if `status=rejected`, else nullable, max:500).

**Note:** Rejecting an order may trigger a cancellation penalty warning — see `.ai/` docs on penalty warnings.

**Error response (422):** invalid transition / missing reason for rejection.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment methods available for merchant/POS checkout, grouped by type. Unlike most list endpoints, the response is a plain array of groups (no `meta`) — mirrors `/api/v0/customer/payments` but includes Cash.

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

item.name: Delivery
item.description: Biteship courier delivery management for orders. All endpoints gated behind the `delivery` app_mode feature flag — expect 403 `FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE` if the merchant/app mode does not support delivery.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get Biteship delivery details for an order.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery` — 403 `FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE` if disabled for the merchant.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/orders/{{order_id}}/delivery`

**Purpose:** Get the tracking history/timeline for a delivery.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery`.

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/orders/{{order_id}}/delivery/tracking`

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Dispatch a courier for the order via Biteship.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery`.

**Method / URL:** `POST /api/v0/merchant/orders/{{order_id}}/dispatch-delivery`

**Error response (422):** order not eligible for dispatch (wrong status, already dispatched).

**Purpose:** Force a manual refresh of tracking status from Biteship (in case webhook was missed).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery`.

**Purpose:** Manually submit a waybill/tracking number for couriers that require manual entry.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery`.

**Body:** `waybill_id` (required, string, max:100); `courier_code` (required, string, max:50).

**Error response (422):** validation error.

**Purpose:** Re-attempt courier dispatch after a failed/cancelled delivery (e.g. courier unavailable).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `delivery`.

**Body:** `mode` (string, e.g. `same_courier` or `new_courier` — read directly from the request, not validated by a FormRequest; confirm accepted values with backend team before relying on this in production).

item.name: Profile
item.description: Merchant profile and branding (logo/cover). Path uses `{{merchant_id}}` — set by Login or manually.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get the merchant's own profile/settings (name, address, schedule, tax, feature toggles).

**Auth required:** Yes (`verify.merchant` re-checks DB membership).

**Method / URL:** `GET /api/v0/merchant/{{merchant_id}}`

**Purpose:** Update merchant profile settings.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (all `sometimes`):** `name` (string, max:255), `description`, `phone` (max:20), `email` (email, max:255), `website` (url, max:255), `terms`, booleans `dine_in`/`takeaway`/`delivery`/`auto_process_on_payment_settlement`/`tax_is_enable`/`charge_app_payment_fee_to_customer`, `tax_name` (max:100), `tax_value` (numeric 0-100), `schedule[]` (full replace array of `{day_of_week (in:monday..sunday), open_time (H:i), close_time (H:i, after open_time)}`), `address.{address,province,city,district,village,postcode,lat (-90..90),lng (-180..180)}`.

**Error response (422):** validation error, e.g. `close_time` before `open_time`.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Soeat Demo Kitchen",
    "description": "Authentic Indonesian street food, made fresh daily.",
    "phone": "081234567890",
    "email": "contact@soeatdemo.id",
    "website": "https://soeatdemo.id",
    "terms": "Orders cannot be cancelled once in process.",
    "dine_in": true,
    "takeaway": true,
    "delivery": true,
    "auto_process_on_payment_settlement": true,
    "tax_is_enable": true,
    "charge_app_payment_fee_to_customer": false,
    "tax_name": "PPN",
    "tax_value": 10,
    "schedule": [
        {
            "day_of_week": "monday",
            "open_time": "09:00",
            "close_time": "21:00"
        },
        {
            "day_of_week": "tuesday",
            "open_time": "09:00",
            "close_time": "21:00"
        }
    ],
    "address": {
        "address": "Jl. Sudirman No. 1",
        "province": "DKI Jakarta",
        "city": "Jakarta Selatan",
        "district": "Setiabudi",
        "village": "Karet",
        "postcode": "12920",
        "lat": -6.2088,
        "lng": 106.8456
    }
}

request.description:
**Purpose:** Upload/replace the merchant logo image.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (multipart/form-data):** `image` (required, image file, max 4096 KB).

**Error response (422):** invalid file type/size.

**Purpose:** Upload/replace the merchant cover/banner image.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (multipart/form-data):** `image` (required, image file, max 4096 KB).

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Merchant home dashboard summary.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get home-screen dashboard summary for the merchant app.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Success response (200):**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "orders_today": 12, "revenue_today": 540000, "pending_orders": 3, "completed_orders": 9, "orders_chart": [], "best_sellers": [] } }
```

item.name: Analytics
item.description: Merchant analytics charts.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get time-series order counts/revenue for charting.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params:** `period` (`7d|30d|90d`, default `30d`) OR explicit `start_date`/`end_date` (date strings, overrides `period`).

**Purpose:** Get best-selling products for a period.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params:** `period`/`start_date`/`end_date` as above; `limit` (default 10, max 20).

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

item.name: Earnings
item.description: Settled earnings/ledger listing.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List settled order earnings/ledger entries for the merchant.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[date_from]`, `filter[date_to]`, `filter[orderable_type]` (exact); `sort` (allowed `created_at`, `total_price`, default `-created_at`); `per_page` (default 20, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

item.name: Cart & Checkout
item.description: Staff/POS-initiated cart validation and checkout (separate from the customer-facing checkout API).

request.description:
**Purpose:** Validate cart contents (prices, stock, add-ons) before checkout — typically used by POS/cashier flows.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `products[]` (required, min 1) each `{id, product_id (uuid), name, qty (int min:1), price (numeric), subtotal (numeric), notes (nullable), add_ons[]{id (uuid), name, options[]{id (uuid), name, price}}}`; `coupon_codes` (nullable array of strings).

**Error response (422):** stale price/stock mismatch.

**Purpose:** Create an order directly from the merchant/POS app (staff-initiated checkout, distinct from the customer-facing checkout flow).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `products[]` (same shape as Validate Cart); `customer_type` (required, `guest|customer|anonymous`); `guest_id` (nullable uuid, exists:guests); `guest.{name (required_with:guest), email, phone}`; `customer_id` (nullable uuid, exists:customers); `order_type` (required, `dine-in|takeaway`); `table_id` (nullable uuid, exists:tables); `pickup_time` (required if `order_type=takeaway`); `payment_id` (required uuid, exists:payments); `notes` (nullable, max:500); `coupon_codes` (nullable array).

**Success response (201):** created order.

**Error response (422):** validation error.

item.name: Menu Categories
item.description: Menu category CRUD and reordering.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List menu categories.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[active]`, `filter[parent_id]` (exact); `filter[search]` (matches name/description); `sort` (allowed `name`,`position`,`created_at`, default `position`); `per_page` (default 10, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create a menu category.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `name` (required, max:255); `slug` (nullable, unique per merchant, soft-delete aware); `parent_id` (nullable uuid, exists within merchant); `description` (nullable); `position` (nullable int min:0); `active` (boolean).

**Error response (422):** duplicate slug.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Makanan Utama",
    "slug": null,
    "parent_id": null,
    "description": "Menu makanan utama",
    "position": 0,
    "active": true
}

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single category.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Update a category (all fields `sometimes`; same rules as create). A category cannot be set as its own parent.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Error response (422):** `parent_id` equals own id.

**Purpose:** Soft-delete a category.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Bulk-update category display order.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `categories[]` required array of `{id (required uuid), position (required int min:0)}`.

item.name: Menus
item.description: Menu item (product) CRUD and image management.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List menu items (products).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[category_id]`, `filter[active]`, `filter[stock_enabled]` (exact); `filter[search]` (matches name/code/description); `sort` (allowed `name`,`price`,`stock`,`created_at`, default `-created_at`); `per_page` (default 10, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create a new menu item, optionally with an image in the same request.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (multipart/form-data):** `name` (required, max:255); `code` (required, regex `^[A-Z0-9-]+$`, unique per merchant); `category_id` (required uuid, exists within merchant); `description` (nullable); `price` (required int min:0, in smallest currency unit / IDR); `stock_enabled` (boolean); `stock` (required if `stock_enabled=true`); `stock_alert` (nullable int min:0); `active` (boolean); `image` (nullable, image, mimes jpeg/jpg/png/webp, max 4096 KB).

**Error response (422):** duplicate `code`.

formdata.value: Nasi goreng dengan telur, ayam, dan kerupuk. Best seller!

formdata.description: optional, image, mimes jpeg/jpg/png/webp, max 4096 KB

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single menu item.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Update a menu item (all fields `sometimes`, same rules as create). Note: image is **not** updatable here — use the dedicated Upload Menu Image endpoint.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Soft-delete a menu item.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Upload/replace a menu item's image.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (multipart/form-data):** `image` (required, image, mimes jpeg/jpg/png/webp, max 4096 KB).

formdata.description: required, image, mimes jpeg/jpg/png/webp, max 4096 KB

request.description:
**Purpose:** Remove a menu item's image.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** none.

item.name: Product Add-ons
item.description: Nested add-on groups/options for a menu item (e.g. spice level, size, toppings).

request.description:
**Purpose:** List add-on groups for a menu item (e.g. spice level, toppings).

**Auth required:** Yes.

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create an add-on group with selectable options.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `name` (required, max:255); `min` (required int min:0); `max` (required int, must be `gt:min`); `options[]` (required, min 1) each `{name (required, max:255), price (required int min:0)}`.

**Error response (422):** `max` not greater than `min`.

**Purpose:** Get a single add-on group with its options.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Update an add-on group and its options in one request.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body (all `sometimes`):** same top-level fields as create; `options[].id` (nullable uuid, existing option to update); `options[]._destroy` (nullable boolean — set true to remove that option); options without `id` are created new.

**Error response (422):** `max` not greater than resulting `min`.

**Purpose:** Delete an add-on group entirely.

**Auth required:** Yes.

item.name: Guests
item.description: Walk-in guest management (no account). List endpoint returns a flat unpaginated array with a plain `search` query param.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List walk-in guests (customers without an account) for dine-in/takeaway orders.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params:** flat `search` (NOT `filter[search]`) — matches guest name/phone. **Response is a plain unpaginated array**, unlike most list endpoints.

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Register a new walk-in guest.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `name` (required, max:255); `email` (nullable, email, max:255); `phone` (nullable, max:20).

**Purpose:** Get a single guest.

**Auth required:** Yes.

item.name: Customers
item.description: Customer records derived from settled orders. Index/Get are feature-gated behind `customers`; Search is not.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List customers who have placed at least one settled order at this merchant, ordered by name.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `customers` — 403 `FEATURE_NOT_AVAILABLE` if disabled.

**Query params:** `per_page` (default 15, max 50), `page`. No filter/search/sort params (fixed `orderBy(name)`).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single customer with order history at this merchant.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `customers`.

**Purpose:** Quick customer search (e.g. for checkout autocomplete).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Note:** this endpoint is registered *outside* the `customers` feature-gate group and remains available even when the `customers` feature is disabled — verify with backend if that is intentional.

**Query params:** `q` (required, string, min:1).

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Customer review moderation.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List customer reviews for the merchant.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params:** flat `status` (NOT `filter[status]`, one of `ReviewStatusEnum` values e.g. `pending`,`approved`,`rejected`); `per_page` (default 15, max 50). Fixed `latest()` order — no configurable sort.

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single review.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Approve or reject a customer review.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `status` (required, one of `ReviewStatusEnum`: `pending`,`approved`,`rejected`).

item.name: Galleries
item.description: Merchant showcase/gallery images. Gated behind the `galleries` app_mode feature flag.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List merchant gallery/showcase images.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `galleries`.

**Query params:** `per_page` (default 15, max 50). Fixed `latest()` order.

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Add a new gallery image.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `galleries`.

**Body (multipart/form-data):** `name` (required, max:255); `category` (required, one of `GalleryCategoryEnum`); `active` (sometimes boolean); `image` (sometimes nullable, image, max 5120 KB).

**Purpose:** Update gallery entry metadata and/or replace its image.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `galleries`.

**Body:** same fields as create, all `sometimes`.

**Purpose:** Remove a gallery image.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `galleries`.

item.name: Cancellation Requests
item.description: Merchant decisions on customer cancellation requests. Gated behind the `cancellation` app_mode feature flag.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List customer-initiated order cancellation requests awaiting merchant decision.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `cancellation`.

**Query params:** flat `status` (one of `CancellationRequestStatusEnum`); `per_page` (default 15, max 50). Fixed `latest()` order.

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single cancellation request with its fee preview.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `cancellation`.

**Purpose:** Approve or reject a customer's cancellation request.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `cancellation`.

**Body:** `decision` (required, `approve|reject`); `note` (sometimes nullable, max:500); `reason` (required if `decision=reject`, nullable, max:500).

**Error response (422):** missing `reason` when rejecting.

item.name: Staff
item.description: Staff/team member management. Gated behind the `users` app_mode feature flag. Owner role assignment restricted to existing Owners.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List staff users for the merchant (excludes the current user; non-owners cannot see other Owners).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `users`.

**Query params:** `per_page` (default 15, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Invite/create a new staff member.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `users`.

**Body:** `name` (required, max:255); `email` (required, email, max:255, unique); `phone` (sometimes nullable, max:20); `role` (required, one of `UserRoleEnum`: `owner`,`manager`,`cashier`,`chef`,`waiter`); `password` (required, string, default password policy).

**Note:** only Owners may assign the `owner` role — otherwise `403 FORBIDDEN_ROLE`.

**Error response (422):** duplicate email / weak password. **Error response (403):** non-owner assigning `owner` role.

**Purpose:** Get a single staff member.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `users`.

**Purpose:** Update a staff member (all fields `sometimes`; `email` unique ignoring self; `password` nullable — leave blank to keep current password).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `users`.

**Purpose:** Remove a staff member from the merchant.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `users`.

item.name: Subscription
item.description: Merchant subscription plans, billing history, and Midtrans-based subscribe flow.

**Auth required:** Yes.

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create a Midtrans Snap payment to subscribe/renew a plan.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `plan_key` (required, string, must be one of the configured plan keys — see project memory: `offstore_trial`, `offstore_monthly`, `offstore_semesterly`, `offstore_yearly`, `instore_trial`, `instore_monthly`, `instore_semesterly`, `instore_yearly`).

**Success response (200):** Midtrans Snap token/redirect URL.

item.name: POS
item.description: Point-of-sale data feeds. Gated behind the `pos` app_mode feature flag. Both endpoints return plain unpaginated arrays.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List active products optimized for the POS/cashier UI — a richer payload than the admin **Menus** endpoints, including add-ons, live discount, and pre-order (PO) availability so the cashier UI can build a cart without extra requests.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `pos`.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[category_id]` (exact); `filter[search]`; `sort` (allowed `name`,`price`,`created_at`, default `name`). **Response is a plain unpaginated array** (no `meta`).

**Success response (200) item shape:**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "merchant_id": "uuid",
  "name": "Truffle Risotto",
  "slug": "truffle-risotto",
  "description": "...",
  "price": 50000,
  "discount": { "unit": "percentage", "value": 10, "price": 45000 },
  "stock": { "enabled": true, "qty": 20 },
  "image": { "default": "https://...jpg", "thumbnail": "https://...jpg" },
  "category": { "id": "uuid", "name": "Appetizers", "slug": "appetizers" },
  "add_ons": [ { "id": "uuid", "name": "Spice Level", "min": 1, "max": 1, "required": true, "multiple": false, "options": [ { "id": "uuid", "name": "Hot", "price": 0 } ] } ],
  "is_active": true,
  "is_po": false,
  "po_availability": null,
  "created_at": "2026-07-01T13:43:46+00:00",
  "updated_at": "2026-07-01T13:43:46+00:00"
}
```
`discount` and `po_availability` are `null` when not applicable.

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {
pm.test("Product item includes add_ons, discount, is_po, po_availability, structured stock/image", function () {

item.name: Finance
item.description: Payout/withdrawal requests (Midtrans Iris) and beneficiary bank account management.

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get the merchant's current payable balance available for withdrawal.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** List past payout/withdrawal requests.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Query params:** `per_page` (default 15, max 50). Fixed `latest()` order.

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Get a single payout's status and disbursement details.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Purpose:** Request a payout/withdrawal to a registered beneficiary bank account via Midtrans Iris.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `beneficiary_id` (required uuid, exists:beneficiaries); `amount` (required int, min:10000); `notes` (nullable, max:500).

**Error response (422):** amount exceeds payable balance, or a payout is already in progress.

**Purpose:** List registered bank account beneficiaries for payouts.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Response is a plain unpaginated array**, `latest()` order, includes `disbursement` relation.

exec: pm.test("Response data is a plain array (unpaginated)", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Validate a bank account number with Midtrans Iris before saving it as a beneficiary (returns account holder name for confirmation).

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `disbursement_id` (required uuid, exists:disbursements — i.e. the bank); `account_number` (required, min:6, max:50, digits only).

**Error response (422):** invalid account number.

**Purpose:** Save a validated bank account as a payout beneficiary.

**Auth required:** Yes.

**Body:** `disbursement_id` (required uuid, exists:disbursements); `account_number` (required, min:6, max:50, digits only, unique per merchant); `account_holder` (nullable, max:255); `is_default` (sometimes boolean).

**Purpose:** Remove a beneficiary bank account.

**Auth required:** Yes.

item.name: Discounts
item.description: Product/menu discounts. Gated behind the `discount` app_mode feature flag.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List product/menu discounts.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `discount`.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[active]` (exact); `filter[search]` (matches name); `sort` (allowed `name`,`start`,`end`,`created_at`, default `-created_at`); `per_page` (default 15, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create a product discount (auto-generates `name` if blank when `unit`/`value` are present).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `discount`.

**Body:** `name` (required unless auto-generated, max:255); `unit` (required, one of `UnitTypeEnum`: `percentage`,`fixed`); `value` (required numeric min:0; max:100 when `unit=percentage`); `start`/`end` (nullable date, `end` after `start`); `active` (boolean); `products` (nullable array of uuid, exists:products).

**Error response (422):** `value` > 100 for percentage unit.

**Purpose:** Get a single discount.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `discount`.

**Purpose:** Update a discount (all fields `sometimes`, same rules as create).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `discount`.

**Purpose:** Delete a discount.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `discount`.

item.name: Coupons
item.description: Coupon code management. Gated behind the `coupon` app_mode feature flag.

request.description:
**Purpose:** List coupon codes.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `coupon`.

**Query params (Spatie QueryBuilder):** `filter[active]`, `filter[type]` (exact); `filter[search]` (matches code); `sort` (allowed `code`,`start_date`,`end_date`,`created_at`, default `-created_at`); `per_page` (default 15, max 50).

exec: pm.test("Paginated list has top-level meta and data array", function () {

request.description:
**Purpose:** Create a coupon code.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `coupon`.

**Body:** `code` (required, max:255, unique, soft-delete aware); `unit` (required, `UnitTypeEnum`: `percentage`,`fixed`); `value` (required numeric min:0); `type` (required, `order|product|shipping`); `start_date`/`end_date` (nullable date, `end_date` after `start_date`); `limit_per_user` (required int min:1); `limit_quota` (nullable int min:1); `active` (boolean); `rules` (nullable array of uuid, exists:rules).

**Error response (422):** duplicate `code`.

**Purpose:** Get a single coupon.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `coupon`.

**Purpose:** Update a coupon (fields `sometimes` where relevant, same rules as create; `code` uniqueness ignores self).

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `coupon`.

**Purpose:** Delete a coupon.

**Auth required:** Yes. **Feature gate:** `coupon`.
